title: QvRealistic
description:
My mod is designed to fix "features".
The boat does not roll on the ground and does not fly! A player cannot jump from a mountain into a bucket of water! Realism.
body:
My mod is designed to fix "features".
The boat does not roll on the ground and does not fly! A player cannot jump from a mountain into a bucket of water! Realism.

**/gamerule qvreal_boat**
![qvreal_boat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vuiv5tE1/images/093d621867dcc6613802fe46047643b86fa54d8f.gif)

**/gamerule qvreal_water_drop**
![qvreal_water_drop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vuiv5tE1/images/59fa4fb03ead7ce83da292dbd42e42700e48cdef.gif)

Implemented: 
- Boat only in water
- The player cannot land in 1 block of water from a great height
-
